executives.name: Audra Walsh
executives.background: Ms. Walsh is a professional engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held executive roles at Minas de Aguas Teñidas and Newmont.

executives.name: Sean Harvey
executives.background: Mr. Harvey has over 25 years of experience in the investment banking and mining industries. He has served as Chairman of Victoria Gold since 2007. He was previously President and CEO of Orvana Minerals Corp.
